steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The signal: “A prevalent trend emerged” — a consistent relationship between total settled area and core population density — despite the passage describing examined settlements as having “regionally distinct political structures, economic focuses, and spatial constraints.”

steps.title: Apply the signal
steps.content: When a pattern holds consistently across regionally diverse settlements, those differences must have had limited effect — which is exactly what choice A states. The other options either speculate beyond the passage (B), make distinctions unsupported by the text (C), or contradict the passage (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
